title: Grass Fps
description: This mod pack focuses on fps with some quality of life mods
body:
This modpack tries to increase Fps in your PC.   I know the low FPS issue in Minecraft and tried to fix it.      If you ever used optifine than don't worry this modpack will try to match optifine's appearance and to get increase in Performance than optifine.  





In Gallery Tab, the screenshots are of a **Low End Laptop**.

Specs:- Intel i3 4005u, 
        Nivdia Gtx720m, 
        Ddr3 8gb 1600mz ram, 
        1tb Hhd (not aware of brand), 
        Laptop is always plugged in.



ModPack will soon be available for version: 1.21, 1.20,x.

New updates will be uploaded
And I recommend not to download Beta and Alpha version as they are just mods and nothing else.
